section_miscategorizations.text: He states that if his symptoms worsen, he will contact the office.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is a return precaution / follow-up instruction element and fits better as part of the management plan rather than subjective symptoms or history.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient takes imitrex and tylenol.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This describes current medications the patient is already taking, which belongs in the Subjective section unless framed as a new order or change.
